failed_attempts.sql: WITH ranked_publications AS (SELECT p.id AS publication_id, SUM(ctype = 'seafood'::edge_type AND e.destination_profile_id IS NOT NULL FOR SELECT * FROM profile_relationship e JOIN lateral jsonb_array_elements_text(p.description_lexemes) l ON TRUE WHERE l ~ 'seafood') AS seafood_posts, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) OVER w AS comment_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER w ORDER BY ts_rank(pub.descriptionLexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'seafood')) DESC NULLS LAST) FROM publication pub JOIN publication_collab pc ON pub.id = pc.publication_id LEFT JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id Window w AS (PARTITION BY pub.id ORDER BY c.published_at DESC) GROUP BY pub.id ), ranked_comments AS ( SELECT rpub.publication_id, COUNT(rpub.publication_id) OVER w AS top_comment_count FROM ranked_publications rpub WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY rpub.publication_id ORDER BY rpub.comment_count DESC ) ), top_seafood_posts AS ( SELECT rcp.publication_id, SUM(rcp.seafood_posts) AS total_seafood_posts FROM ranked_comments rcp GROUP BY rcp.publication_id ORDER BY SUM(rcp.top_comment_count) OVER w DESC LIMIT 10 ) WITH RECURSIVE recursive_tree AS ( SELECT publication_id, seafood_posts, comment_count, path[], top_comment_count FROM top_seafood_posts WHERE path = '' UNION ALL SELECT publication_id, seafood_posts, comments.comment_count / (comment_count + 1), path || publication_id, top_comment_count + comments.top_comment_count OVER w FROM recursive_tree r LEFT JOIN ranked_comments c ON r.publication_id = c.publication_id WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY c.publication_id ORDER BY top_comment_count DESC ) ) SELECT * FROM recursive_tree WHERE path IS NOT NULL GROUP BY (path) GROUPING publication_id,
